description: Message contains sensitive HR + personal-conflict content. Model correctly flags sensitivity; pipeline must quarantine, never promote into claims.
traps: Sensitive HR data and a personal conflict in the same message. Pipeline must NOT write claims; the candidate must be quarantined.

messages.text: I had to put Jordan on a final-written warning today after the shouting match with Casey in receiving. Jordan's prior PIP from January is also still on file.

claims.summary: Jordan placed on final-written warning after shouting match with Casey
